title: Soulful Ancient Debris
description: Ancient Debris' vanilla colors blend in with the rest of the Nether blocks. With this, Debris is turned a Soulfire blue, making it way harder to miss it when mining.
body: Ancient Debris' vanilla colors blend in with the rest of the Nether blocks. With this, Debris is turned a Soulfire blue, making it way harder to miss it when mining.
